case_title: CHERYL CLARK VS. MEDTHRIVE COOPERATIVE INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, CHERYL AS TO DEFENDANT MEDTHRIVE COOPERATIVE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
